summary: Iteration 5 (Google Maps links) validated end-to-end. Both PlaceCard pin button and PlaceDetail hero buttons work with correct URLs, targets, and no navigation/JS regressions. Backend endpoints unchanged and healthy.
passed: GET /api/trending → 200, returns 6 places (first: 'Jew Town Chai Wallah')
Home page loads and renders place cards
PlaceCard has data-testid='card-maps-{id}' visible bottom-right of image
Clicking card-maps opens NEW TAB with URL https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Jew%20Town%20Chai%20Wallah%20Kochi
Clicking card-maps does NOT navigate current tab (stays on home) — stopPropagation/preventDefault works
Clicking image body of card still navigates to /place/{id} (regression check)
PlaceDetail (/place/{id}) renders with data-testid='place-detail-page' and no JS/console errors (nested-<a> hydration bug is fixed)
Hero has data-testid='google-maps-link' with text 'Open in Google Maps', target=_blank, href=https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=... (URL-encoded name+city)
Hero has data-testid='google-maps-directions' with text 'Directions', target=_blank, href=https://www.google.com/maps/dir/?api=1&destination=... (URL-encoded name+city)
notes: Discover-result cards were not explicitly re-tested end-to-end via UI, but PlaceCard component is the same shared component so card-maps button will be present there as well. Backend /api/analyze uses field name 'place_name' (not 'query') — pre-existing contract, not a regression.
